articles.title: What we know about Lambiase's move from Red Bull to McLaren
articles.summary: What we know about Lambiase's move from Red Bull to McLaren. Lawrence Barretto delves into Gianpiero Lambiase's confirmed move from Red Bull to McLaren, and what it means for Max Verstappen.

articles.title: Why points-finish bettors should consider Lindblad
articles.summary: Why points-finish bettors should consider Lindblad. The only rookie on the F1 grid this season, but Racing Bulls’ new star is already making a name for himself.

articles.title: Williams sign engineer from Mercedes for key technical role
articles.summary: Williams sign engineer from Mercedes for key technical role. Williams have announced the appointment of Dan Milner from rivals Mercedes to act as their new Chief Engineer – Vehicle Technology.

articles.title: Verstappen’s race engineer Lambiase to join McLaren
articles.summary: Verstappen’s race engineer Lambiase to join McLaren. Max Verstappen’s long-time race engineer Gianpiero Lambiase will leave Red Bull in 2028 and move to McLaren as Chief Racing Officer.

articles.title: Miami and Montreal to host Formula 2 Rounds in 2026
articles.summary: Miami and Montreal to host Formula 2 Rounds in 2026. Formula 2 will be racing in North America for the first time with Miami and Montreal to host Rounds 2 and 3 of the 2026 season.

articles.title: Komatsu not worrying over possibly losing Bearman to Ferrari
articles.summary: Komatsu not worrying over possibly losing Bearman to Ferrari. Ollie Bearman has been a standout performer in 2026 for Haas so far, but the Briton has strong links with Ferrari.

articles.title: 8 of the wildest tech innovations in F1 history
articles.summary: 8 of the wildest tech innovations in F1 history. F1.com takes a look back at some of the most memorable – and eye-catching – tech innovations the sport has witnessed over the years.

articles.title: F1 ACADEMY Champion Doriane Pin on pushing for her dream
articles.summary: F1 ACADEMY Champion Doriane Pin on pushing for her dream. F1 ACADEMY Champion Doriane Pin is Tom Clarkson’s guest on this week’s Beyond The Grid podcast.

articles.title: Crypto.com Overtake of the Month Award
articles.summary: Crypto.com Overtake of the Month Award. Judged by both fans and an expert panel, the Crypto.com Overtake of the Month Award celebrates the drivers that dare to perform the most challenging and courageous overtake manoeuvres during a race.

articles.title: Hamilton betting odds slide despite China podium
articles.summary: Hamilton betting odds slide despite China podium. A first Ferrari podium for Hamilton, but Mercedes’ strong start to the season has seen his chances dip.

articles.title: UPDATED: Verstappen’s engineer Lambiase to join McLaren
articles.summary: UPDATED: Verstappen’s engineer Lambiase to join McLaren. Lambiase is well-known for his partnership with Verstappen, but has also been Red Bull’s head of race engineering, and is a long-term target of McLaren Racing CEO Zak Brown and team principal Andrea Stella to join the constructors’ champions.

articles.title: What’s happening behind the scenes during F1’s impromptu spring break?
articles.summary: What’s happening behind the scenes during F1’s impromptu spring break?. Unlike the summer break, there is no mandatory factory shutdown when teams and suppliers are not allowed to work on their machinery. So with such unexpected flexibility, what is the sport up to  before racing resumes in Miami?

articles.title: The RACER Mailbag, April 8
articles.summary: The RACER Mailbag, April 8. Drivers on hot seats, how oval tracks' official lengths can change and prospects for the return of F1 V8s among topics filling the RACER Mailbag this week.

articles.title: Audi not planning direct replacement for departed Wheatley
articles.summary: Audi not planning direct replacement for departed Wheatley. Mattia Binotto will continue to fill Audi's team principal role, but he wants more support trackside.

articles.title: Why F1 is still a game of haves vs have nots in a cost cap era
articles.summary: Why F1 is still a game of haves vs have nots in a cost cap era. Budget caps and changes to revenue distribution may have helped F1 be closer than ever before, but it's still the biggest teams that lead the field.

articles.title: Williams expect biggest performance gains after summer break
articles.summary: Williams expect biggest performance gains after summer break. Williams has developments on the way, but the biggest gains won't come until after the August factory shutdown.

articles.title: Red Bull confident it can resolve early season car issues
articles.summary: Red Bull confident it can resolve early season car issues. Red Bull is well-placed to solve the issues that it is currently facing with its car that leaves it a distant fourth in the pecking order, according to team principal Laurent Mekies.

articles.title: Alpine refutes claims it is sabotaging Colapinto
articles.summary: Alpine refutes claims it is sabotaging Colapinto. Alpine has issued an open letter refuting claims of fans that it is sabotaging Franco Colapinto’s chances of scoring points, as well as while condemning social media abuse against drivers.

articles.title: Increased number of overtakes at Suzuka is a step forward for F1, says Ferrari’s Vasseur
articles.summary: Increased number of overtakes at Suzuka is a step forward for F1, says Ferrari’s Vasseur. The 2025 edition of the race featured just 15 overtakes after the opening lap, whereas this year saw that number exceeded in the first 16 laps of the race prior to the first pit stops taking place.

articles.title: F1 2026: the story so far on new rules, a new star…and an unhappy multiple champ
articles.summary: F1 2026: the story so far on new rules, a new star…and an unhappy multiple champ. What’s your take on F1 2026? Have Formula 1’s latest power unit regulations broken the world’s most popular motorsports series? Or are we at the start of a new era of competitiveness, unpredictability and thrilling rac...

articles.title: Verstappen race engineer Lambiase to join McLaren
articles.summary: Verstappen race engineer Lambiase to join McLaren. Red Bull's Gianpiero Lambiase, Max Verstappen's race engineer, agrees to join McLaren from 2028.

articles.summary: What do you think is the most beautiful F1 car of all time?. Choose what you think is the best-looking F1 car in history from our shortlist of 13, spanning the 1950s to 2025.

articles.summary: Why tweaks - not major changes -  expected to F1's rules. Andrew Benson analyses what changes Formula 1 could make at a series of meetings about its new rules.

articles.summary: Why Honda engine is not the only issue with Aston Martin - F1 Q&A. BBC Sport F1 correspondent Andrew Benson answers your latest questions.

articles.title: Maybe Verstappen needs a break from F1? - Hill
articles.summary: Maybe Verstappen needs a break from F1? - Hill. On the latest episode of The Chequered Flag Podcast, 1996 F1 world champion Damon Hill thinks that if Max Verstappen is not enjoying the sport any more following regulation changes then perhaps he needs to take a break.

articles.title: 'Antonelli had the luck, but sometimes you need it'
articles.summary: 'Antonelli had the luck, but sometimes you need it'. On the latest episode of The Chequered Flag Podcast, Harry Benjamin, Alice Powell and Bec Clancy discuss how Kimi Antonelli benefitted from a slice of luck to take the win in Japan and feel that Mercedes will be ruing the extended break from racin...

articles.title: Antonelli celebrations 'lovely to see' - Benson
articles.summary: Antonelli celebrations 'lovely to see' - Benson. On the latest episode of the The Chequered Flag Podcast, pundits Andrew Benson and Sam Bird say Kimi Antonelli's Chinese Grand Prix win at 19 years old "is as big as it comes" for a young driver, after the Italian was moved to tears following his win.

articles.title: 'He's back again' - Ferrari's Hamilton praised after Chinese GP
articles.summary: 'He's back again' - Ferrari's Hamilton praised after Chinese GP. On the latest episode of The Chequered Flag podcast, Sam Bird believes Lewis Hamilton's spark "is back" again after the British driver finished in third at the Chinese Grand Prix.
